response.overview: To ensure the safety of Earth from the invading Cthulhu, the android warrior Iczer-One must protect high school girl Nagisa Kano, whom she has chosen as her "synchronization partner" to pilot the Iczer Robo and fend off the Cthulhu threat. Still traumatized by the deaths of her parents, Nagisa struggles to team up with Iczer-One and must come to the realization that they are both Earth's only hope.
response.title: Iczer-1
